title: Spezi Bed
description: Changes The Bed Texture into Spezi
body:
![Spezi Bed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/79f721c04d92932c458146b647a64baa7e17a30a.png)

Changes Texture of the **Bed** into **Spezi**

Now you can sleep in your favorite drink 😴😴
isn't that great?


<details>
<summary>What is that?</summary>

its a german soda called "Paulaner Spezi"

in America its called "Paulaner Sunset"

</details>

<details>
<summary>Versions</summary>
Support for 1.21, 1.20, 1.19, 1.18 & 1.17

</details>


<details>
<summary>Questions?</summary>
Find more on my profile page

</details>
